modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, §6§lNeoForge§r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts chat text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts the dark chat background while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.overla: Options to tweak overall HUD while in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.chat.d: Tweaks for the in-bed chat overlay.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.camera: Camera tilt and mouse feel while resting and during the sleep skip.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.sleep_: World-space Zs shown around players who are counted for sleep.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.darkness.de: Controls how dark the sleep vignette becomes.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.leave_bed_h: Toggles §o"Press §e§oCROUCH_KEY§r§o to leave the bed"§r message.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.sleep_conte: Toggles contextual sleep messages such as bed restrictions and sleeping progress.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.dim_multiplier: Controls the overall chat opacity while the player is in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.max_lines.desc:
How many chat lines remain visible while lying down.

Set it to §c0§r to hide the chat completely.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.tilt_degrees: Camera tilt angle while lying down.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.mouse_smooth: How smooth the mouse movement will be when lying in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_zzz.chance.de: Chance to show Zs for each counted sleep session.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_zzz.style.des: Changes the movement style of the sleeping Zs.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.debug_logs.des: Shows Seamless Sleep technical logs in the §elatest.log§r.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.replay_compati: Adjusts the animation math to an §eexperimental§r one compatible with mods, such as ReplayMod and Flashback.
config.seamlesssleep.advanced.notice: §eSpooky advanced settings. Change these only if you know what they do!
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe: Chance to clear rain and thunder after sleeping.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.duration_mult: Scales the duration of the sleep animation.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.fall_asleep_d: How long a counted player must stay in bed before the sleep skip can start.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.eligibility.d: Controls whether players can sleep only by vanilla rules, during the day, or at any safe time.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.override_over: Uses a server-defined global text for the textual Overlay indicator during normal sleep skips.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.overlay_custo: Plain global text shown by the textual Overlay indicator when override is enabled.
config.seamlesssleep.server.group.easter: Server-side chances for special sleep modes.
config.seamlesssleep.easter_eggs.made_in: Chance for a bed sleep skip to become Made In Heaven. Set to 0 to disable.
config.seamlesssleep.server.group.accele: Resource acceleration settings used while the sleep skip is active.
§cNONE§r → Disables the system.

§eAUTO §r→ System/Server aware controller.
§rWill regulate the feature based on overall health.

§fMANUAL§r → Uses the fixed values chosen by the host.

Chunk radius used by nature and process acceleration.

In §eAUTO§r, it previews the controller ceiling (Best case scenario).

Controls random tick acceleration intensity.

In §eAUTO§r, it previews the controller ceiling (Best case scenario).

Defines which players determine the accelerated area.

"Sleepers" uses only players who are currently sleeping.

"All Players" uses every player in the accelerated dimension.
Defines the ceiling (Maximum values) used by the controller while Acceleration Mode is in §eAUTO§r.
Enables grass spreading and foliage acceleration.
Enables acceleration for farms, crops and saplings.

Enables kelp as part of random tick acceleration.
§7Did this because ocean LAGGY :/
Restricts nature acceleration to vanilla blocks only.

Enables furnace, smoker and blast furnace acceleration.

Will affect every "AbstractFurnaceBlockEntity".
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.sleep_: Controls the active sleep indicator renderer and placement.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_indicator.mod: Selects the active sleep indicator renderer.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_indicator.anc: Screen anchor used by the sleep indicator placement.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_indicator.vis: When the sleep indicator should be rendered.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep_indicator.sca: Scale for the sleep indicator renderer.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.created: Config not found. Default created and loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.error: Failed to read config. Defaults loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.synced: All clients synchronized with the server.
command.seamlesssleep.set.sleep_clears_w: Weather Clear Chance is set to %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.statu: World acceleration status is unavailable right now.
World rate %sx, avg %s MSPT, p95 %s MSPT, governor %s.
Nature -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, extra attempts/section %s, covered chunks %s.
Processes -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, multiplier %sx, covered chunks %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.gover: AUTO controller bypassed because the current mode is %s.
Controller has no live data right now because world acceleration is inactive.
Inputs -> world rate %sx, avg %s MSPT, p95 %s MSPT, players %s, simulation distance %s, randomTickSpeed %s.
Pressure -> avg %s, p95 %s, perf %s, player risk %s, sim risk %s, rate risk %s, factor %sx, aggressiveness %sx, final %s.
Nature -> action %s, radius %s/%s min %s, rate %s/%s min %s, extra/section %s (%s + frac %s), total/section %s, multiplier %sx, chunks %s.
Processes -> action %s, radius %s/%s min %s, rate %s/%s min %s, multiplier %sx, chunks %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.rando: Random Tick / Nature acceleration updated to %s.
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.notice: Forge does not have a config menu mod :/
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.hint: Edit the config file in your config folder for server and client changes.
screen.seamlesssleep.missing_yacl.hint: Install YetAnotherConfigLib v3 to edit configs.
